overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a Mediterranean-style harbor town during golden hour. The journey begins on a wooden ship, continues through bustling market squares and covered passages, and ends along a waterfront path at sunset.

events.description: character walks down gangway and exits ship onto stone dock

agents.ego_description: walking across wooden ship deck and descending onto the dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the ship's deck with rope coils and nautical equipment
large wooden water wheel attached to harbor structure
cluster of Mediterranean-style buildings on hillside

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on the wooden deck of a ship in a sunny harbor. The character walks across the deck past a large wooden water wheel on the left, then descends onto the stone dock. The harbor town rises in the distance against a clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor marketplace with wooden stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling marketplace among townspeople and merchants

notable_agents.action: merchant in orange tunic standing near wooden barrels
townsperson in dress walking past the character

entered.detail: sunlit cobblestone ground of the marketplace
wooden stalls with fabric awnings selling goods
large stone building with arched openings at the far end of the plaza
stacks of wooden barrels near market stalls

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a sunlit cobblestone marketplace filled with wooden stalls, barrels, and moderate crowds. Mediterranean-style buildings surround the plaza, with a prominent stone archway building visible in the distance. NPCs walk about engaging in various activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden market passage with stone arch exit

events.description: enters covered wooden market structure from open plaza
exits through stone archway into open street

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly covered market passage toward the stone archway exit

notable_agents.action: townsperson in red tunic walking ahead through the passage

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with beams and hanging decorations
stone archway exit at the end of the covered passage
distinctive blue-painted building visible through the structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered wooden market passage where the lighting becomes dimmer and more diffuse. The structure features wooden beams and hanging fabrics, with a stone archway visible ahead marking the exit. Other pedestrians walk through the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront street with stone bridge crossing

events.description: crosses small stone bridge over water canal

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront and crossing a stone bridge over a canal

notable_agents.action: child in green tunic running ahead on the path

entered.detail: small stone bridge with wooden railings crossing over water
calm water canal running alongside the path
tall buildings with red terracotta roofs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered passage, the character walks along an open waterfront street lined with red-tiled buildings. The path crosses a small stone bridge over a canal, with water visible on the right and scattered pedestrians including a child running ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path at sunset with large trees

events.description: sun becomes more prominent creating strong backlit golden hour effect

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt waterfront path toward the setting sun

entered.detail: large leafy tree providing shade over the path
open view of water with sun setting on the horizon
wooden market stall with fabric roof near the water

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a dirt waterfront path as the sun sets, creating a warm backlit atmosphere. Large trees provide shade while the harbor opens up to wider water views. The lighting shifts to a golden hue as the character walks toward the sunset.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the deck of a ship into the heart of a Mediterranean harbor town, ending along a sun-drenched waterfront at dusk. It begins on a wooden ship deck past a large water wheel before descending onto a stone dock and moving into a bustling cobblestone marketplace filled with wooden stalls and crowds. As the character progresses, the open plaza shifts into a semi-covered wooden market passage where the lighting becomes dimmer and more diffuse beneath hanging fabrics and heavy beams. The scene then opens back into the bright air as the camera follows the path across a small stone bridge over a canal, passing red-tiled buildings and scattered pedestrians. Finally, the environment transitions into a dirt waterfront path where the light shifts to a warm, golden hue, moving under the shade of large trees toward the setting sun.
